title: Present proposed courses of action at a meeting
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Present proposed courses of action at a meeting demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop course of action and documentation

pcs.text: Identify and compare a range of courses of action

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and compare a range of courses of action.

elements.title: Present recommendations
